**Date:** 2026-07-19  
**Sensitive data:** Test credentials listed (API key PZD8GFFU, DB password AQ2MKQUS, etc.) appear to be examples; confirm if real and revoke immediately.

**Infrastructure summary:** 20+ services across 5 environments (prod, staging, QA, dev sandbox, canary/blue/green pools) underwent extensive operations: upgrades, patches, scaling, rollbacks, reconfigurations, health-checks. Mostly successful; no customer impact reported.

**Recent activity (2026-07-19):** 30+ operations across cache-warmer, search-indexer, session-manager, user-profile-service, metrics-collector, auth-service, audit-logger, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, billing-worker, export-pipeline, ingest-api, report-builder. Outcomes: some required manual retries; alerts cleared; CPU/memory pressure reduced; postmortem notes added; Grafana showed expected dip-recovery patterns; pagers stayed quiet. Team agreed to revisit thresholds next week. Documentation updated; follow-up config-tidying tasks filed.
